title: Fresh Festive Norwegian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring lamb, dried mint, and a glassy jelly texture, perfect for special occasions. This kosher-friendly dish is sure to impress your guests.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium high heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and cubed potatoes to the pot, cook for 5 minutes.
Add the browned lamb, beef broth, kosher salt, black pepper, and dried mint to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours.
Stir in the red currant jelly and continue to simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh mint if desired.
